nasb.text: But when they believed Philip preaching the good news about the kingdom of God and the name of Jesus Christ, they were being baptized, men and women alike.

esv.text: But when they believed Philip as he preached good news about the kingdom of God and the name of Jesus Christ, they were baptized, both men and women.

cnv.text: 等到腓利向他們傳了　神的國的福音，和耶穌基督的名，他們就信了腓利，連男帶女都受了洗。

ccb.text: 后来，他们相信了腓利传的有关上帝的国度和耶稣基督的福音，男男女女都接受了洗礼。

csbs.text: 可是腓利传讲有关神国的福音和耶稣基督之名的时候，他们就相信了，无论男女都受了洗，
